name: Colbor Softbox BP45 45cm Honeycomb Parabolic Bowens Light Studio
description: The 17.7" COLBOR Quick-Setup Parabolic Softbox with Grid and Bowens Mount softens the output of the CL60, CL60M, CL60R, CL100X, and CL100XM lamp heads' LEDs.

features.Key Features:: Softens Output of Bright LEDs | Includes Grid for Directional Control | Reduces Contrast | For CL60, CL60M, CL60R, CL100X, CL100XM
features.What’s in the box?: COLBOR Quick-Setup Parabolic Softbox with Grid and Bowens Mount (17.7") | Bowens Speed Ring
